text: Disciple, you must learn to refine Spirit Pills. The cauldron awaits.
Yes, Master. I will do my best.
The herbs... they burned! I do not understand what went wrong.
Patience. Alchemy requires precise control of qi. Try again.
Master, I have failed again. The essence scattered...
*sigh* The path of cultivation is long. Here, take this perfect pill and study it.
This... this is a perfect Spirit Pill! Thank you, Master!
Remember: true mastery comes from understanding, not rushing. Now begin again.
Learn alchemy from your Master. Craft a Spirit Pill under his guidance.
